name: FeiyuTech Scorp 2 Gimbal with Standard Accessories
description:
FeiyuTech SCORP 2 - Integrated AI tracking sensor & underslung handle, super weapon for solo filmmaking.

From ease of installation to payload performance to interactive design, SCORP 2 is your companion for creating and capturing amazing content.

features.Key Features :: Motorized 3-Axis Dual-Handgrip Gimbal | 2.5kg Maximum Payload | Built-in AI Tracking Module | L-shaped 2.0 Quick Release System | Rapid Vertical Installation | SCORP T-shaped Integrated Handle | 1.3" OLED Touchscreen & Upgraded Joystick | Cable & Bluetooth Camera Control
features.Standard Package: 1x Feiyu SCORP 2 | 1x Tripod | 1x USB 2.0 to USB-C charging cable | 7x Camera control cable (USB-C to Multi, USB-C to Micro, USB-C to USB-C, USB-C to TRS2.5, USB-C to DC2.5mm, USB-C to TRS3.5, USB-C to Mini) | 1x Allen key | 1x Fixed plate | 1x Slider | 1x Quick release plate | 1x Camera backing base | 1x Lens holder | 1x Lens holder screw | 3x Camera fixed screw | 1x Manual Book
